title: HybridSearchManager Foundation
impact: Foundation for three-layer hybrid search architecture combining semantic, lexical, and symbolic signals

searchCoverage.target: Unified hybrid search with per-layer scores

tasks.title: Create Hybrid Search Types
tasks.description: Define TypeScript interfaces for hybrid search including HybridSearchOptions, SymbolicFilters, and HybridSearchResult in src/types/types.ts.

implementation.purpose: Define type-safe interfaces for the three-layer hybrid search system. These types enable combining semantic, lexical, and symbolic search signals with configurable weights.
keyDecisions: HybridSearchOptions contains weights for each layer (semantic, lexical, symbolic)
SymbolicFilters provides structured metadata filtering (tags, types, dates, importance)
HybridSearchResult includes per-layer scores for transparency

stepByStep.details: Navigate to the types file which contains all type definitions for the project

stepByStep.action: Find the end of the file (before any closing exports)
stepByStep.details: Scroll to the bottom of the file. Add new interfaces after existing Phase 10 types

stepByStep.action: Add section comment for Hybrid Search Types

acceptanceCriteria: HybridSearchOptions interface defined with all weight options
SymbolicFilters interface defined with all filter types
HybridSearchResult interface defined with per-layer scores
npm run typecheck passes with no errors

tasks.title: Create SymbolicSearch Class
tasks.description: Create the symbolic/metadata search layer that filters entities using structured predicates on tags, types, dates, importance, and hierarchy.

implementation.purpose: Provide metadata-based filtering as the third layer of hybrid search. Filters entities using structured predicates rather than text matching.
keyDecisions: All filters are AND-combined (entity must match all specified filters)
Score based on proportion of filters matched
Helper methods for common single-filter queries

stepByStep.details: Create the new file in the search directory

stepByStep.code:
/**
 * Symbolic Search Layer
 *
 * Phase 11: Provides metadata-based filtering using structured predicates.
 * Part of the three-layer hybrid search architecture.
 *
 * @module search/SymbolicSearch
 */

import type { Entity, SymbolicFilters } from '../types/index.js';

stepByStep.action: Add SymbolicSearch class with search method

acceptanceCriteria: SymbolicSearch class created with search() method
All filter types implemented (tags, types, dates, importance, parent, hasObservations)
Score calculated based on filter match proportion

tasks.title: Create HybridSearchManager Class
tasks.description: Create the main hybrid search orchestrator that combines semantic, lexical, and symbolic search layers with configurable weights.

implementation.purpose: Orchestrate the three search layers (semantic, lexical, symbolic) and merge their results using weighted scoring. This is the core of the hybrid search system.
keyDecisions: Execute all three layers in parallel for performance
Normalize weights automatically to sum to 1.0
Gracefully handle failures in individual layers
Track which layers contributed to each result
implementation.existingCodeContext: SemanticSearch exists in src/search/SemanticSearch.ts, RankedSearch (TF-IDF) exists in src/search/RankedSearch.ts. SymbolicSearch created in task 11.1.2.

stepByStep.details: Create the new file in the search directory

stepByStep.action: Add searchWithEntities method for full entity resolution

acceptanceCriteria: search() method executes all three layers in parallel
Graceful error handling for layer failures

tasks.title: Create HybridSearchManager Unit Tests
tasks.description: Create comprehensive unit tests for HybridSearchManager and SymbolicSearch classes.

implementation.purpose: Verify hybrid search correctly combines all three layers, handles edge cases, and produces accurate combined scores.

acceptanceCriteria: Tests for SymbolicSearch filtering (tags, types, importance)
Tests for helper methods (byTag, byType, byImportance)
All tests pass with npx vitest run

successCriteria: All four tasks completed with passing tests
SymbolicSearch class filters entities by metadata
HybridSearchManager orchestrates all three search layers
notes: CRITICAL: All three layers execute in parallel for performance
Weights are normalized automatically - user doesn't need to ensure sum = 1.0
Symbolic layer gives base score (0.5) when no filters specified
Individual layer failures are handled gracefully without failing entire search
This sprint provides foundation for Sprint 2 (hybrid_search MCP tool)

IMPORTANT: Must add 'rankedSearch' getter to ManagerContext for Sprint 2 handlers to work. Add after semanticSearch getter: get rankedSearch(): RankedSearch { return (this._rankedSearch ??= new RankedSearch(this.storage)); }
NOTE: Current tool count is 61 (not 55 as stated in CLAUDE.md). Phase 11 will bring total to 66 tools.
